evals.prompt:
TASK: Add tenant_id scope to purchaseOrderService.listOrders()
FILES:
  - apps/api/src/services/purchaseOrderService.js (modify: add tenant_id WHERE clause)
  - apps/api/src/__tests__/purchaseOrderService.test.js (add: tenant isolation test)
DO NOT TOUCH:
  - apps/api/src/routes/purchaseOrders.js
  - apps/api/src/middleware/auth.js
ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
  - [ ] listOrders() includes `WHERE tenant_id = $1` in query
  - [ ] Test: calling listOrders with tenant A does not return tenant B orders
  - [ ] Existing purchaseOrderService tests still pass
TEST COMMAND: cd apps/api && npx jest --no-coverage purchaseOrderService
COMMIT PREFIX: fix(api):
evals.expected_output: Worker modifies exactly the 2 listed files, runs the test command, commits with fix(api): prefix, writes a handover doc

assertions.text: Worker only modifies files listed in FILES section, not DO NOT TOUCH files
Worker runs the exact TEST COMMAND from the spec (not a different test command)
Worker writes a handover doc as its final action
Handover includes acceptance criteria checklist with pass/fail for each item
Worker does not refactor, clean up, or improve code beyond the acceptance criteria

evals.prompt:
TASK: Add pagination to supplier list API
FILES:
  - apps/api/src/services/supplierService.js (modify: add limit/offset params to listSuppliers)
  - apps/api/src/routes/suppliers.js (modify: read page/limit from query params)
  - apps/api/src/__tests__/supplierService.test.js (add: pagination tests)
DO NOT TOUCH:
  - apps/api/src/middleware/auth.js
  - apps/admin/src/pages/SupplierList.jsx
ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
  - [ ] listSuppliers() accepts limit and offset parameters
  - [ ] GET /suppliers?page=2&limit=10 returns correct page
  - [ ] Default limit is 50, default page is 1
  - [ ] Tests cover: default params, explicit params, empty result
  - [ ] Existing supplier tests still pass
TEST COMMAND: cd apps/api && npx jest --no-coverage supplierService
COMMIT PREFIX: feat(api):
evals.expected_output: Worker implements pagination in service + route, writes tests, does NOT touch the frontend SupplierList.jsx, commits with feat(api): prefix, writes handover

assertions.text: Worker does not modify SupplierList.jsx even though it consumes the API
Worker's implementation addresses all 5 acceptance criteria
Worker writes a handover doc as its final action
Handover includes pass/fail for each of the 5 acceptance criteria
